nasb.text: For the death that He died, He died to sin once for all; but the life that He lives, He lives to God.

esv.text: For the death he died he died to sin, once for all, but the life he lives he lives to God.

cnv.text: 他死，是向罪死了，只有這一次；他活，是向　神活著。

ccb.text: 祂死，是向罪死，只死一次；祂活，却是向上帝永远活着。

csbs.text: 原来他死，是一次性地向罪而死；他活，是向神而活。
